source: SEC EDGAR point-in-time quarterly TTM financial facts + daily EOD prices (stooq selection; EODHD, Stooq, and Yahoo fallback where applicable)

backfillErrors.TSM: no comparable quarterly SEC financial facts
backfillErrors.AVGO: latest comparable TTM period is stale (2019-08-04); history was not overwritten

methodology: For each trading date: EOD close divided by the latest already-filed rolling-four-quarter EPS, operating cash flow per share, and revenue per share. Per-share denominators use the average diluted weighted shares of the same four quarters.
